parameters.query:
UPDATE seo_kws.tasks t
SET status = 'running', attempts = attempts + 1
WHERE id = (
  SELECT t2.id FROM seo_kws.tasks t2
  JOIN seo_kws.jobs j ON j.id = t2.job_id
  WHERE t2.status = 'pending' AND t2.attempts < 3 AND j.status != 'paused'
  ORDER BY t2.id LIMIT 1
)
RETURNING t.id, t.keyword, t.job_id, t.attempts,
  (SELECT lang FROM seo_kws.jobs WHERE id = t.job_id) as lang,
  (SELECT country FROM seo_kws.jobs WHERE id = t.job_id) as country,
  (SELECT num_results FROM seo_kws.jobs WHERE id = t.job_id) as num_results,
  (SELECT client_id FROM seo_kws.jobs WHERE id = t.job_id) as client_id
UPDATE seo_kws.tasks SET status = 'completed', scraped_at = NOW() WHERE id = {{ $('Build SQLs').first().json.task_id }}

UPDATE seo_kws.jobs j SET
  completed_keywords = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seo_kws.tasks WHERE job_id=j.id AND status='completed'),
  failed_keywords = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seo_kws.tasks WHERE job_id=j.id AND status='failed'),
  status = CASE
    WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seo_kws.tasks WHERE job_id=j.id AND status IN ('pending','running'))=0
      AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seo_kws.tasks WHERE job_id=j.id AND status='failed')>0 THEN 'failed'
    WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seo_kws.tasks WHERE job_id=j.id AND status IN ('pending','running'))=0 THEN 'completed'
    ELSE 'running'
  END,
  started_at = COALESCE(j.started_at, NOW()),
  completed_at = CASE
    WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seo_kws.tasks WHERE job_id=j.id AND status IN ('pending','running'))=0 THEN NOW()
    ELSE NULL END
WHERE j.id = {{ $('Lock Task').first().json.job_id }}
UPDATE seo_kws.tasks SET status = CASE WHEN attempts >= 3 THEN 'failed' ELSE 'pending' END, last_error = LEFT('{{ $json.error.replace("'", "''") }}', 500) WHERE id = {{ $json.task_id }}

UPDATE seo_kws.jobs j SET
  completed_keywords = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seo_kws.tasks WHERE job_id=j.id AND status='completed'),
  failed_keywords = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seo_kws.tasks WHERE job_id=j.id AND status='failed'),
  status = CASE
    WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seo_kws.tasks WHERE job_id=j.id AND status IN ('pending','running'))=0
      AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seo_kws.tasks WHERE job_id=j.id AND status='failed')>0 THEN 'failed'
    WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seo_kws.tasks WHERE job_id=j.id AND status IN ('pending','running'))=0 THEN 'completed'
    ELSE 'running'
  END,
  started_at = COALESCE(j.started_at, NOW()),
  completed_at = CASE
    WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seo_kws.tasks WHERE job_id=j.id AND status IN ('pending','running'))=0 THEN NOW()
    ELSE NULL END
WHERE j.id = {{ $('Lock Task').first().json.job_id }}

UPDATE seo_kws.tasks t
SET status = 'running', attempts = attempts + 1
WHERE id = (
  SELECT t2.id FROM seo_kws.tasks t2
  JOIN seo_kws.jobs j ON j.id = t2.job_id
  WHERE t2.status = 'pending' AND t2.attempts < 3 AND j.status != 'paused'
  ORDER BY t2.id LIMIT 1
)
RETURNING t.id, t.keyword, t.job_id, t.attempts,
  (SELECT lang FROM seo_kws.jobs WHERE id = t.job_id) as lang,
  (SELECT country FROM seo_kws.jobs WHERE id = t.job_id) as country,
  (SELECT num_results FROM seo_kws.jobs WHERE id = t.job_id) as num_results,
  (SELECT client_id FROM seo_kws.jobs WHERE id = t.job_id) as client_id
